title: Notice of commencement of interim study
doc_html:
Rule 13.13. Notice of commencement of interim study

           A notice shall be sent to all members of the legislature of the commencement of an interim study by a Senate committee or by a joint committee, pursuant to Paragraphs A(2) and A(3) of Rule 13.12.
doc_text:
Rule 13.13. Notice of commencement of interim study
A notice shall be sent to all members of the legislature of the commencement of an
interim study by a Senate committee or by a joint committee, pursuant to Paragraphs A(2)
and A(3) of Rule 13.12.
